---
title: "The extension: quarto-manubot-cite"
---

A Quarto extension that wires `pandoc-manubot-cite` (shipped inside
[manubot](https://github.com/manubot/manubot)) into any Quarto project.
Authors cite by persistent identifier; the bibliography updates on next
build.

::: {.callout-note}
Authoritative documentation lives in
[`_extensions/seandavi/quarto-manubot-cite/README.md`](https://github.com/seandavi/quartobot/blob/main/_extensions/seandavi/quarto-manubot-cite/README.md)
in the repo. This page summarizes for the website navbar — keep the
README and this page in sync.
:::

## Install

```bash
quarto add seandavi/quartobot
pip install 'manubot>=0.6,<0.7'
```

(`pip install manubot` is what puts `pandoc-manubot-cite` on `PATH`. The
filter ships as a console-script entry point inside the manubot package;
there is no standalone PyPI package.)

## Configure

In `_quarto.yml`:

```yaml
filters:
  - quarto-manubot-cite

manubot-output-bibliography: references.json
manubot-bibliography-cache: _freeze/manubot-cache.json
manubot-fail-on-errors: false
manubot-infer-citekey-prefixes: true

bibliography:
  - references.bib
  - references.json
```

`references.bib` is for hand-curated entries. `references.json` is
written by `pandoc-manubot-cite` at render time and merged with the bib
by pandoc citeproc. Add `references.json` and `_freeze/` to `.gitignore`
— both regenerate from source.

## Cite

| Prefix       | Example                                |
|--------------|----------------------------------------|
| `@doi:`      | `@doi:10.1371/journal.pcbi.1007128`    |
| `@pmid:`     | `@pmid:31479462`                       |
| `@pmcid:`    | `@pmcid:PMC6735409`                    |
| `@arxiv:`    | `@arxiv:2104.10729`                    |
| `@isbn:`     | `@isbn:9780262035613`                  |
| `@url:`      | `@url:https://manubot.org`             |
| `@wikidata:` | `@wikidata:Q56458094`                  |
| bare DOI     | `@10.1371/journal.pcbi.1007128`        |

See manubot's
[`pandoc-manubot-cite` reference](https://manubot.github.io/manubot/reference/manubot/pandoc/cite_filter/)
for the full vocabulary and normalization rules.

## Failure mode

`pandoc-manubot-cite` defaults to warn-and-continue: a Crossref or
PubMed hiccup logs an error but doesn't fail the render. The unresolved
citation appears in the output with the cite key intact. Set
`manubot-fail-on-errors: true` if you want builds to fail loudly.

## See also

- [manubot](https://github.com/manubot/manubot) — the upstream package.
- [Himmelstein et al. 2019](https://doi.org/10.1371/journal.pcbi.1007128) —
  the foundational manubot paper. Cite it if you use this extension.
- [Cache file location decision](https://github.com/seandavi/quartobot/issues/8)
  — why `_freeze/manubot-cache.json`.
- [Bibliography merge semantics](https://github.com/seandavi/quartobot/issues/10)
  — open question; precedence between `.bib` and `.json`.
